request_create: nexusctl request create --objective TEXT --missing-capability TEXT --business-impact TEXT --expected-behavior TEXT --acceptance-criteria TEXT --risk-class low|medium|high|critical --priority P0|P1|P2|P3 --goal-ref ID --output json
request_transition: nexusctl request transition <request_id> --to STATUS --reason TEXT --output json
work_plan: nexusctl work plan <request_id> --repo REPO_ID --branch NAME --assign AGENT_ID --sanitized-summary TEXT --output json
work_evidence: nexusctl work submit-evidence <request_id> --kind KIND --summary TEXT --ref REF --output json
github_pr_link: nexusctl github pr link <request_id> --url URL --output json
review_submit: nexusctl reviews submit <request_id> --verdict approved|changes-requested|rejected --summary TEXT --output json
